name: Clearwater Analytics Holdings, Inc.
description: Clearwater Analytics Holdings, Inc. provides a SaaS-based investment portfolio planning, accounting, reporting, and analytics platform. The company's platform helps clients, including insurers, investment managers, corporations, and other institutions, to aggregate, reconcile, and report on their investment data. It offers automated data aggregation, reconciliation, and reporting solutions that enable clients to streamline their investment operations and make informed investment decisions.
